title: Set a date range for Charts.
excerpt:

posts.author: MattyD (Matty Dunlop)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board which I completely rebuilt; I then moved all the items from the old board into the new board.

In my charts, I have one that tells me the amount created per month, to track the different packages being purchased each month. However, as I have imported everything from one board to another, the first column of that chart is huge and makes reading the rest of the chart a lot more difficult.

I have looked all around to see if I can tell the chart to only track within a date range, effectively removing the month everything was imported making the chart only track new items the month after the board’s creation, but I can’t find a way of doing that.

So, if it is possible, could someone tell me where and how? If not, then feature request to make that possible.

Thanks in advance!
